title: taraxacum cophocentrum
intro: Taraxacum cophocentrum, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in lawns and meadows worldwide. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum cophocentrum include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum cophocentrum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
